title: Monster Mulling Merger With Constellation
text: Monster Beverage Corporation ( MNST , Financial) released record fourth quarter and full year results for 2021 on Thursday amid ongoing reports that executives are mulling a possible deal with Constellation Brands ( STZ , Financial).

title: Monster Beverage (MNST) Q4 Earnings in Line, Sales Surpass
text: Monster Beverage (MNST) Q4 top-line benefits from strong consumer demand, particularly for energy drinks. Higher costs and supply-chain headwinds continue to mar the bottom line.

title: A Trio of Stocks Growing Free Cash Flow Fast
text: If you are looking for opportunities to invest in U.S.-listed stocks, you may want to consider the stocks of companies whose free cash flow has increased significantly in recent years. As a result, these companies should have the flexibility to continue supporting the development of projects and returning cash to shareholders.

title: Here's How Monster Beverage (MNST) Looks Ahead of Q4 Earnings
text: Monster Beverage (MNST) Q4 results are likely to reflect gains from strong demand, product launches and innovation. Inflationary costs resulting from supply-chain headwinds are likely to have hurt.

title: Monster Beverage And Constellation Brands Merger Could Shake Up The Beverage Landscape
text: The possible merger of Monster Beverage and Constellation Brands would bring two leaders in their space under one roof and could change the beverage space for good.

title: Energy Drink Maker Monster, Corona Beer Owner in Merger Talks
text: Monster Beverage and Corona brewer Constellation Brands are talking about combining companies, Bloomberg reported Monday (Feb. 14), citing sources familiar with the situation. The merger agreement could go forward in the next few weeks if negotiations go well.

title: MNST, STZ Stocks Alert: Is Monster About to Merge With Constellation Brands?
text: Monster and Constellation Brands are rumored to be discussing a potential merger. MNST stock and STZ stock are on watch.

title: Monster Beverage Stock Rises Amid Merger Talks
text: The shares of Monster Beverage Corporation (NASDAQ:MNST) are up 2.2% at $84.40 at last check, amid progressing merger talks between the energy drink giant and Corona brewer Constellation Brands (STZ).
